ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "onset" REAL /* Onset time of the trial in seconds */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time recorded during the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* The trial number for categorization */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* The type of trial (e.g., BALOON, CONTROL) */,
  "button_pressed" INTEGER /* The button pressed by the participant */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the participant (e.g., ACCEPT, CASHOUT) */,
  "explode_trial" INTEGER /* Indicator if the trial exploded (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "trial_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trial outcome */,
  "trial_cumulative_value" INTEGER /* Cumulative value across trials */,
  "payoff_level" INTEGER /* Level of payoff for the trial */,
  "onset_noTriggerAdjust" REAL /* Onset adjustment value when no trigger is detected */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who undertook the trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the trial occurred */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, in-progress, aborted) */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "trial_environment" TEXT /* Environment settings during the trial */,
  "trial_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "participant_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the participant */,
  "participant_group" TEXT /* Group to which the participant belongs (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment conducted */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  "session_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the session organizer */,
  "session_participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the session */,
  "session_environment" TEXT /* Environment settings during the session */,
  "session_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who undertook the trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the trial occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the trial (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., valid, invalid, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., BALOON, CONTROL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "type_duration" REAL /* Typical duration of the trial type */,
  "type_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions provided to participants for the trial type */,
  "type_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the trial type */,
  "type_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the action */,
  "button_pressed" INTEGER /* Button that was pressed during the trial */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the participant */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., valid, invalid, pending review) */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the action */,
  "action_duration" REAL /* Duration of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_button_actions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial linked to the reward */,
  "payoff_level" INTEGER /* Level of payoff for the trial */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of reward given */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., given, pending, revoked) */,
  "reward_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the log */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant linked to the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., valid, invalid, pending review) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the feedback */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments given by the participant */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending review) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
